resources.string: Enter the user ID (username) to add.
At least one source remains enabled so the picker never becomes empty.
Authenticate with Face ID or Touch ID to continue.
Authenticate with Face ID or Touch ID to continue.
Face ID / Touch ID is not available on this device.
Are you sure you want to delete this record? This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this entire session and all its records? This cannot be undone.
Choose how far a horizontal swipe seeks.
Share anonymous play, download, and favorite metadata with Coming Bird (beta). You can change this anytime.
"Your in-app activity helps keep Coming Bird's new arrivals and rankings fresh."
Build new arrivals and rankings together
Only video-related metadata is sent. It does not include information that can identify you personally.
No personally identifying data is included
Coming Bird is a service where TwiXXX users can check new arrivals and rankings based on videos they played, downloaded, or favorited.
Share anonymous video metadata with Coming Bird to help improve its new arrivals and rankings.
Do not send data to Coming Bird. You can change this anytime later in Settings.
Would you help by sharing viewing data? You can change this anytime later in Settings.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
More options button in the content view is clicked.
Continue video playback in a floating window.
Customize all theme colors and keep up to three presets. Clipboard import/export works on the selected slot.
This will permanently delete the downloaded file. Are you sure?
Disabled by your setting and hidden by the internal availability flag.
Disabled by your setting. Internal availability flags are currently ignored.
Display playback duration and file size on downloaded item thumbnails.
Download failed. Tap Retry to resume.
動画ダウンロードの進捗通知
アクセストークンを取得できませんでした
Google アカウントが見つかりません
Google Drive との同期が正常に完了しました
TwiXXX バックアップ完了
Google Drive に初回バックアップを保存しました
サインインに失敗しました
サインインに失敗しました: %1$s
Auto sync will be turned off until you sign in again.
Google Drive と同期しました
Show a persistent stopwatch on the video detail screen to track session duration
Enable, disable, reorder, and override source availability flags
Enabled, but currently hidden by the internal availability flag.
Enabled. Internal availability flags are ignored.
Enter text to filter the current list.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
You can save up to 5 accounts.
"This connection uses unofficial X web data. We strongly recommend using a throwaway account for login. Proceed only if you understand the risks."
This will remove the saved cookies/token for this account from Keychain.
Up to 5 accounts. Automatically switches account on HTTP 429.
No X account connected. Add one below.
Choose how favorite-user lists and the \"More from\" section are fetched.
"Unofficial X connection. Behavior may change when X changes its site. This mode fetches video posts only. Rate limits or account restrictions may occur, so use a spare account."
Face ID / Touch ID is not available on this device.
Choose how favorite users appear in the list.
Filters use estimated metadata and may take time to load.
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
Enable Amoled Black visual effects on Android 12+. Disable if you experience crashes.
Back up and sync data across devices
Select a previously exported JSON file.
Scan the QR code on the exporting device.
Get updates on our Discord server
Keep inline carousel controls near the top while scrolling when the top bar menu is off.
This license text is unavailable in the current build.
Lock the app until you authenticate.
Long-press any video card to see a quick preview with download options.
Moves downloaded videos in or out of Files.
An Android app for comfortably browsing Twitter save and ranking sites.
Save videos and register favorite users so you can come back to them anytime.
Run monsnode searches directly inside TwiXXX to quickly find videos and users.
Go beyond monsnode and switch between six major sources, including Twivideo, from a single app.
Support at %1$s or above on Patreon to unlock supporter perks.
The Patreon backend URL is not configured yet. Deploy the Worker and update TwiXXXConfig first.
Custom colors are unlocked in this OSS privacy build.
Miuix and Material 3 Expressive are unlocked in this OSS privacy build.
Patreon integration is not configured yet.
The Patreon entitlement response was invalid.
Patreon login completed, but no session token was returned.
Patreon login could not be started.
Patreon was connected, but the current membership is below %1$s.
Patreon was connected, but this membership is not currently active.
Patreon was connected, but no active membership at %1$s or above was found for this campaign.
This removes the Patreon session from this device.
Patreon has been disconnected on this device.
Create your own palette and switch between up to three presets.
Use the Miuix and Material 3 Expressive design variants.
Try new builds before the stable release.
Patreon supporter access has been refreshed.
Custom themes and modern design systems are unlocked in this OSS privacy build.
Set the Patreon Worker URL in TwiXXXConfig to enable Patreon login.
Playback speed while holding a long press.
Playback speed while holding a swipe.
Preview updates immediately. Your app theme changes only after you apply.
Report bugs, requests, and improvement ideas
Reset applies to the live theme immediately.
Scan this QR code from another device to import.
Select carousels from the top bar
Move source, period, sort, and metric pickers into the top bar menu.
Select the output language for translations.
Failed to share. The file may be missing or inaccessible.
Show duration and size on thumbnails
Shows experimental timer and debug features.
Shuffle the Shorts queue each time you open Shorts mode.
Skip the detail view for downloaded videos.
Start downloads immediately even when Wi-Fi is unavailable.
Swipe left on a download to delete, or swipe right to move to a folder.
Copy the current tone to the other tone.
Amoled Black, Miuix, Material 3 Expressive, Forest, Ocean, Sakura, Wisteria, Mimosa, or Mono
Tap the bookmark or person icons to save to favorites.
Translate tweet content using DeepL API.
Turn sources on or off, then drag to change the order shown in Home and Ranking.
You have unapplied custom theme edits.
Use the compatibility path for background downloads.
Used to resolve X video links without API configuration.
View and clear the recorded log file.
When a detail, X, redirect, or direct video URL is gone, open the archived snapshot instead.
Enabled: download immediately. Disabled: use extracted direct-link options (copy URL or download).
When enabled, MonosLogger writes app logs to a local file (up to 200 entries).
When enabled, sources hidden by startup availability checks can still appear if you turned them on below.
When opening a video detail, submit still-available targets to Wayback Machine after the disappearance check finishes.
Only sync when connected to Wi-Fi
